_comment: Image manifest. All paths are relative to the /public folder. Replace any path with your own image to update it sitewide. Dimensions are recommended for best display.

logos._comment: Three logo variants. Used in Header (light), Footer (light), Login page (dark), Register page (dark). Replace PNG files in /public/

dark.description: Black logo on white background — used on light backgrounds (login, register pages)

light.description: White logo on dark brown background — used on dark backgrounds (header, footer)

cream.description: Brown logo on cream background — available as alternative for light neutral backgrounds

ogImage.description: Default Open Graph image — appears when the site is shared on social media
ogImage._note: Create this image and place it in /public/ to enable social sharing previews

appleTouchIcon._note: Create this file and place it in /public/

products._comment: Product images. Currently products use CSS color blocks as placeholders. To add real images, create files at these paths and update imageUrl in src/data/products.ts

placeholder.description: Products currently use brand color blocks as placeholders. Add real product images by: 1) placing PNG/JPG files in /public/images/products/, 2) updating the imageUrl field in src/data/products.ts
placeholder.recommendedSize: 800×800px, square format, white or transparent background

hero._comment: Hero/banner images. Currently the hero uses CSS-generated product mockups. Replace with real lifestyle photography.

homeBanner.description: Home page hero banner — product flat-lay or lifestyle shot
homeBanner._note: Currently rendered as a CSS illustration. Add a real image file and update src/pages/Home.tsx

aboutHero._note: Currently a dark background with CSS. Add image and update src/pages/About.tsx

pattern._note: Currently generated via CSS. Can be replaced with a custom SVG pattern.
